headlines.title: Typhoon Jangmi
headlines.summary: The sprawling storm promised to deliver torrential rain across a wide swath of southern Japan.

headlines.title: NASA Space Roboticist Challenge
headlines.summary: The Fly Foundational Robots (FFR) mission will launch a robotic arm, with seven degrees of freedom, to low Earth orbit. NASA is opening access to the robotic arm to a select group of U.S. researchers — principal investig
